description: Creates a point (dot) on a number line at a specified value
utility: Marks a single position on a number line with optional styling and hollow/filled appearance

arguments.name: numberLine
arguments.description: The number line to place the point on

arguments.name: x
arguments.description: The position (value) on the number line where the point appears

arguments.name: color
arguments.description: Optional color using c(colorName). Defaults to black

arguments.name: radius
arguments.description: Optional point radius using r(size). Defaults to 6

arguments.name: type
arguments.description: Optional 'open' or 'hollow' to create an unfilled point

alternates.description: Create a solid filled point at position x

examples.scenario: Mark a point at x=3 on a number line

examples.expression: N = nl(at(1,1), 2, 8, range(0, 10)); pt = nlpoint(N, 5, c(red))
N = nl(at(1,1), 2, 8, range(0, 10)); pt = nlpoint(N, 7, c(blue), r(8))
